# `LoadPalette`

**Systems:** NES  
**Parameters:** `a`

---

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

<h3>LoadPalette(palette);</h3>


<h3>Description</h3>
<p>Loads a palette to the PPU. Palettes are automatically exported together with a NES FLF tile/charset, and consists of
4*4*2 = 32 bytes of data (4 bytes per custom palette, 4 custom palettes, 2 banks)


</div>
